summary: An ABC7 (Los Angeles) news segment about TSA officer callouts at Long Beach Airport during the shutdown, with a live aerial shot of LAX and B-roll of checkpoints. Standard local-news report with chyrons; no music or stylized production.
notable_text: ABC7 'ICE AGENTS EXPECTED TO BE AT 14 AIRPORTS' / '21% OF TSA WORKERS CALLING OUT AT LGB'
